content.en:
So in the following days, Ye Tian went all out to cultivate the Thirty-Six Star Dimensional Secret Technique.

As for the mysterious woman, he didn't rush over.

However, he still sent a replica body to continue exploring the Kunxu Land, with his current strength, it would be much safer to explore the Kunxu Land, and it was rare to find a seventh-realm multidimensional life that could be stronger than him.

Soon after.

Ye Tian finally found a healing thing again-jellyfish color lotus, this healing thing is of a higher grade than Yunwei Golden Fruit, but the number is only one, and the total value is naturally inferior to those Yunwei Golden Fruits.

Guarding this jellyfish Cailian is a very strong snake seventh-realm multi-dimensional life, and the other party is sleeping.

But when Ye Tian approached here, the other party woke up.

"Outsiders, look for death!"

This seventh realm multi-dimensional life instantly attacked Ye Tian, a "two-two-hundred" gray light crossed the dimensional void and directly attacked Ye Tian's body, this attack ignored the distance of the dimensional void, and could not dodge at all, so he could only choose to resist hard.

I saw that Ye Tian urged the Primal Domain Body and easily resisted this move.

But if he hadn't cultivated the Primal Domain Body, he felt that he would most likely not be able to withstand it, because the power of this blow had already reached the full strength of the top seventh realm.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian fought with this multi-dimensional life snake of the seventh realm, constantly casting sword twelve, leaving sword marks on his body.

However, this multi-dimensional life is indeed strong enough, and its vitality is very tenacious, and it has been holding on for a long time, and then it was severely injured by Ye Tian and escaped.

And this jellyfish color lotus belongs to Ye Tian.

In the days that followed, he found several healing things one after another, and the multi-dimensional lifeforms of the seventh realm he encountered were not strong, and they were easily killed by him.

And he didn't give them to the mysterious woman when he found them, but waited until a little longer to give them to her.

Otherwise, if he went now, the mysterious woman would definitely know that he had cultivated the Primal Domain Body.

It's not normal to practice to the primordial domain body so quickly.

So, he continues to keep these healing things now.

Time passed, and a full five hundred domain years passed.

"The thirty-sixth of the Thirty-Six Star Secret Techniques has been completed!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

He finally cultivated this secret technique to the limit, at this time, even the most powerful Eighth Realm could not deduce his traces, unless it was the Eighth Realm that mastered the deduction ability of the Ninth Realm, but this kind of Eighth Realm should be extremely rare, who would study the deduction so deeply?

That would have to create a deduction and other supreme mastery, and a fool would spend countless years creating such a deduction supreme mastery.

However, in order to cultivate the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique, he also spent countless copies of his body before he could practice it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to cast the secret technique of the Primordial Arrival.

"The Beginning Comes!"

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian gradually spied on the Primal Star in the sixteenth dimension, silently contemplating, and the power of the Primordial Star spread, but this time he did not perceive Ye Tian's other copy bodies, only affecting this true body copy body.

"Sure enough, shielding the perception of the primordial star, it can't spread its power by replicating the connection between the bodies, which will only damage my replicating body. "

Ye Tian was very excited.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian comprehended the primordial star to comprehend the rules of the primordial dimension.

With this comprehension, Ye Tian's body was eroded and assimilated even more seriously, but the efficiency of comprehending the rules of the dimension was too fast, and that Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone was far inferior to the Primal Star!

Moreover, after comprehending the rules of the thirty-six dimensions, the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone would not help him much, and if he wanted to comprehend the rules of the thirty-seven dimensions, it would take at least hundreds of domain yuan years.

But now it's different, it won't be long before he can fully comprehend the rules of the thirty-seven dimensions.

However, his body didn't last long.

Soon, he felt that the flesh of the replica body had been almost eroded, and his will began to sink.

"Solution!"

The replicated body quickly annihilated and dissipated.

Then, he continued to let another replica body perform the Primordial Advent and continue to comprehend the rules of the dimension.

In this way, in less than a tenth of the domain yuan years, he successfully comprehended the rules of the thirty-seven dimensions.

Then, he continued to comprehend the rules of the Thirty-Eight Dimensions!

This time, it took him one-fifth of the domain yuan years to comprehend the rules of the thirty-eight dimensions, and such high efficiency made Ye Tian is excited.

Before I knew it, a hundred years had passed.......

At this time, Ye Tianyijiang comprehended the rules of the seventy-three dimensions.

When the dimensional rules reach seventy-two, the primordial domain body can be cultivated to the Xiaocheng realm.

Subsequently, he began to cultivate the Primal Domain Body, but he would definitely not be able to raise the Primal Domain Body to the Xiaocheng realm in a short period of time, and it would take a long time.

And when he comprehended the rules of the dimension, Ye Tian also had a certain understanding of the Primal Star, and his heart also ignited the idea of using the Primordial Star as the basis to create a Seven Realms Supreme Peerless Sect or even the Supreme Peerless Sect.

However, it was best for him to create the Seven Realms Supreme Peerless Sect first, so that the difficulty would be reduced.

So, in the days that followed, his other replica bodies studied and created the Seven Realms Supreme Sect by the way.

He thought it would take him a long time, but he didn't expect that after only a few years of contemplating the Primal Star, he would successfully create a supreme mastery of the Seven Realms - the Primal Void Technique.

The Primal Void Technique uses the power of the Primordial Star to distort the dimensional void to make itself incredibly fast.

The reason why he created the speed class Seven Realms Supreme Peerless Peerless Sect first was entirely because the power of Sword Twelve was okay, and there was no need to create the Seven Realms Supreme Peerless Realm Realm Peerless Realm of the attack class first, and the increase in strength was not too exaggerated.

After that, he created the Seven Realms Supreme Peerless Sect again, and it took some years to create the second Seven Realms Supreme Peerless Sect again-the Primal Starlight!

The attack power of the Primal Starlight is much higher than that of the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sword Twelve.

After that, he successively created several supreme 5.4 studies of the Seven Realms, so that his strength reached the level of almost invincible in the Seventh Realm.

After all, the Seven Realms Supreme Absolute Realm is extremely difficult to create, and many extradimensional realms that can create the Supreme Absolute Realm in the Sixth Realm, but when they reach the Seventh Realm, they may not be able to create their own, because the difficulty has increased too much.

But now, Ye Tian felt that it might not be too difficult to create the Seven Realms Supreme Peerless Technique, because he had the Primal Advent and could observe a star like the Primal Star up close.

Time flies.

Hundreds of more domain years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's dimensional rule realm had finally reached the eighty-eighth level, this realm was extremely high, and countless seventh realms would never be able to ascend to this realm.

Some more years have passed.

Ye Tian's primordial domain body finally broke through to the realm of Xiaocheng.
